text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Hishi Akebono has pulled to the front in the last
hundred meters! She's putting all 180 centimeters
of her height to good use in those powerful
strides!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Rrrraaahhh!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
The rest of the pack is trying to catch up, but
they just can't reach her! And it's Hishi Akebono,
blasting past the finish line at top speed!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hishi Akebono and I have started our sprint
toward the Twinkle Series. After an exciting
scrimmage wraps up...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
The soup's refreshing taste comes from the
seasonings. I went with kombu seaweed and light
soy sauce, as well as sake, mirin, and salt! ♪

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
And the meatballs should be infused with those
yummy flavors too! I used miso and salt as secret
ingredients, so they're on the sweeter side.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
I also kneaded the meatballs while adding water
to the paste to really bring out the umami flavors!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Aaand there! Hishi Akebono's Special Chanko is
done! ☆

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Eat up, everyone! You have to eat up so you'll all
be ready to take on tomorrow!

text_block_list.name: Students
text_block_list.text: Yaaay!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hishi Akebono is in the middle of serving chanko
to an army of students.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Oh, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Right? I made a heap of food so everyone can
have their fill after running so hard during the
scrimmage...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
But the food's nearly gone already! I'm glad
everyone ate so much, though!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Oops, I'd better hurry and eat too! Hold on, I'll go
grab some for you as well!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Hishi Akebono's dream is to become like chanko.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
I want to be a runner who opponents can race
against with all their strength!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Someone who can feel proud of her efforts, and
who always ends up with a smile on her face,
whether she wins or loses!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Yep, that's why I entered Tracen Academy!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She wants both herself and her opponents to be
able to run with all they've got, without any
regrets. And she wants to cook up enough food
to fill everybody up.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That's the sort of person she wants to be.
Someone who's vital to ensuring that all sumo
wrestlers can be sturdy and powerful together...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Essentially, she wants to be their chanko.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Thank you kindly, Akebono! Boy howdy, was it
fun to hang out with y'all!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
You're quite incredible, but I will be the victor
next time we race!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
After all, I do feel incredibly energized after
eating so much!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Taiki Shuttle, a student with a tall figure and an
even bigger heart, and Sakura Bakushin O, a
rather intense class representative, have come to
say a happy hello.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sakura Bakushin O specializes in sprints, while
Taiki Shuttle's fortes are sprints and miles. Both
are spectacular racers in their own right.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha! Me too! Here's to a great race next
time! ♪

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Phew! That was fun.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe. Actually, I was just thinking about how
much I love seeing everyone smile, just like they
did today.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
And about how I want to keep doing everything I
can in the Twinkle Series.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
It'd be nice to run really good races with
everyone, and then all smile together...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
I'll have to work really hard to make that all
happen.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Just then...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Tap, tap, tap, tap!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: Bono, Bono, Bono, Bono!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Biko Pegasus, a hero-idolizing student who's
good friends with Hishi Akebono, comes running
up to us.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Oh my. What is it, Biko?

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: Come quick! You have to see what's on TV!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Pushing us from behind, Biko Pegasus hurries us
to my office...

text_block_list.name: Announcer
text_block_list.text:
Hishi Akebono is one of the tallest racers to run
in the Twinkle Series since its founding!

text_block_list.name: Announcer
text_block_list.text:
She's scheduled to make her debut this year, and
her stature has already garnered a lot of
attention from fans!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: Look, Bono, you're on TV! Isn't that amazing?!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Ooh! We recorded this stuff the other day. Ahaha!
They made me look really cool!

text_block_list.name: Woman A
text_block_list.text:
She's so big and cute! I fell for her the moment I
saw her in that magazine!

text_block_list.name: Man A
text_block_list.text:
I just can't wait until Hishi Akebono runs her
debut race!

text_block_list.name: Announcer
text_block_list.text:
Hishi Akebono hasn't even debuted yet, and she's
already a hot topic. We have nothing but great
expectations for her future!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Wow. Everyone's already so excited to see me.

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
How are you so calm?! You're on everyone's radar
and you haven't even debuted yet!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha! Yeah, you have a point there. I guess it
does feel a little weird!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
That reminds me... People have been commenting
and wishing me good luck with my debut on
Umastagram lately.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Oh, it's a social media platform where you can
post pictures or do live streams! I stream while I
cook sometimes.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Um, let's see... Here! Look at these comments!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There are lots of messages expressing excitement
for Hishi Akebono's debut, and wishing her luck,
but a few messages in particular catch my
attention.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One says, "No way is she gonna be able to run
long distances with such a huge body," while
another reads: "She's so powerful... Wouldn't she
be better on dirt?"

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I notice another one. "She must weigh a lot too,
and that's gotta put a ton of strain on her legs. I
wonder if she'll be okay..."
choice_data_list: People sure have lots of opinions.
People sure have lots of opinions.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: They sure do.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
It's true that I'm not very confident about my
stamina since I'm so big, and that my legs have to
take more strain than lighter racers'...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: But I still don't think being big is a bad thing.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
I always have a clear view of what's around me, I
can reach whatever I need, and placing first is
really fun!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: Indeed! If you weren't big, you wouldn't be Bono!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Ahaha! You're so right.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If that's the case, the best approach would be to
utilize her size to the fullest as we train hard and
seize those wins in the Twinkle Series.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: It's been a few days since I came up with my plan.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hishi Akebono and I chat about her future over a
pot of chanko.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Huh? You want me to focus on bulking up for a
while?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Hmm, okay...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A larger body mass can help with reaching top
speed quickly, among lots of other things.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In other words, Hishi Akebono could wield her
exceptional size as a weapon that's unique to her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Still, in order to make the best use of that
weapon...
choice_data_list: We'll have to make your body more resilient.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: We will?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I draw a comparison between a motorcycle and a
bus. If the two vehicles turned the same corner at
the same speed, the bigger, heavier bus would be
subjected to a more intense centrifugal force.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The more mass you have, the more centrifugal
force will be exerted on you, and that results in a
greater burden being placed on your body as it
tries to manage that force.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Additionally, it takes a considerable amount of
leg strength for a heavy racer to go from standing
still to top speed, which creates even more strain.
choice_data_list:
That's why we need to bolster your body so it
can handle all that stress.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I break down my reasoning into smaller, easily
understood concepts, and she listens to me with
ever-widening eyes.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Hey, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
So you really think I should bulk up rather than
slim down?
choice_data_list:
Yep. Your size is your weapon. It's what makes
you special, so I want to make the most of it.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe! Oh... Okay, I'll do my best to bulk up,
then!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Actually, I was thinking that way would be truer
to myself, too.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: I'm glad we're on the same page, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'd like to focus more on training than having
Hishi Akebono run in races, at least until we've
finished building up her body.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If we really want to capitalize on her strengths,
then we have to take our time and be thorough
with our preparation.
choice_data_list: Let's take this nice and easy, okay?
Let's take this nice and easy, okay?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Okay!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! Would you like some seconds? You can
have as much as you like!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With a great big smile on her face, Hishi Akebono
scoops more sweet chicken meatballs into my
bowl.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, Hishi Akebono and I set off together on
our journey toward the Twinkle Series!
